front.title: Avoidance of ROA Containing Multiple IP Prefixes

abstract.t: When using the Resource Public Key Infrastructure (RPKI), address space holders need to issue Route Origin Authorization (ROA) object(s) to authorize one or more Autonomous Systems (ASes) to originate routes to IP address prefix(es). This memo discusses operational problems which may arise from ROAs containing multiple IP prefixes and recommends that each ROA contains a single IP prefix.
